mechanism_narrative: An always-on acceleration in CPIAUCSL over the prior 3 months raises expected policy tightening and compresses equity valuation multiples, causing lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 284.182 for 2022-02-01 at the decision date
regime_hint: inflation shock with expected monetary tightening
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month CPIAUCSL changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered historical observations.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 6-month average after a flat policy period, the start of tightening raises discount rates and reduces risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 6-month average after being below or equal to it in the prior month
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.08 for 2022-02-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS upward-crossing events have average 60-day forward S&P 500 returns equal to or above the unconditional average return.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth combined with a falling UNRATE indicates rising household income without labor-market deterioration, supporting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is negative
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 150399.0 and UNRATE vintage value was 3.8 for 2022-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition does not raise the hit rate of positive 20-day returns above the unconditional hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in RSAFS reveals weakening nominal consumer demand, lowering near-term revenue expectations for index constituents and causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS monthly percent change crosses below -1.0%
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 649776.0 for 2022-01-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if RSAFS monthly drops below -1.0% are followed by nonnegative 20-day S&P 500 returns in at least 60% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: An always-on positive 3-month trend in INDPRO reflects improving production capacity and real activity, raising earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was 103.4677 for 2022-01-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO trends have a 60-day forward return mean that is not higher than negative 3-month INDPRO trends.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average, residential investment is weakening and cyclical demand expectations fall, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1638.0 for 2022-01-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downward-crossing events are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional positive-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: High CPIAUCSL inflation while FEDFUNDS remains low creates a policy catch-up gap; markets reprice future hikes abruptly, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 12-month percent change exceeds 5% and FEDFUNDS remains below 1%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL was elevated while FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.08 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the high-CPIAUCSL and low-FEDFUNDS interaction has a nonnegative average 20-day forward S&P 500 return after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months marks labor-market deterioration, reducing income and earnings expectations and causing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.8 for 2022-02-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE increases above the 0.3 percentage point threshold are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases.
